body:
# All Mobs Hate The SUN

When hostile mobs are out in bright daylight they catch fire and take damage. Every second they lose three hearts of health, and a flame overlay appears on them. The fire damage ignores armor, so even heavily armored mobs still burn.

The effect only happens during the day and only for hostile mobs.
description: Hate when hostile mobs don't burn in daylight? This mod makes ALL hostile mobs burn in the sun.
title: All Mobs Hate The SUN
